heading: View Backup Policies
body:
Atlas CLI

To return the details of the backup policy for the cluster you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas backups schedule describe <clusterName> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas backups schedule describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-backups-schedule-describe).

Atlas UI
